languages.text: "Данные неполны. Планета врага излучает эманации неизвестной природы, создающие помехи при {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгурации{/g}". {n}Мастер вокса едва заметно медлит с продолжением фразы.{/n} "При прорыве мы столкнемся, как минимум, с одним звеном перехватчиков, возглавляемым тяжелым крейсером".

traits.locale_text: "По совокупным данным {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуров{/g}, как минимум несколько сотен легких истребителей. Также зафиксировано одно... " {n}Мастер вокса едва заметно медлит с продолжением фразы. {/n} "Простите, Лорд-капитан. Одна сверхтяжелая боевая единица с неизвестными характеристиками. В докладе особо отмечено, что ее размеры превосходят флагман нашего флота минимум в два раза".

languages.text: "The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."
languages.original_text: "Данные неполны. Планета врага излучает эманации неизвестной природы, создающие помехи при {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгурации{/g}". {n}Мастер вокса едва заметно медлит с продолжением фразы.{/n} "При прорыве мы столкнемся, как минимум, с одним звеном перехватчиков, возглавляемым тяжелым крейсером".

traits.locale_text: "The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."

"The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."

"The aggregated augur data indicates at least several hundred light fighters. We have also detected one... " {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "I apologise, Lord Captain. One super-heavy combat unit with unknown characteristics. The report specifically notes that it is at least twice the size of our fleet's flagship."

"The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."

"The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."

languages.text: 「集約された占星術のデータから、少なくとも数百機の軽戦闘機が確認された。また、1つ...」{n}ヴォックス・マスターはわずかに躊躇した後、続けた。{/n}「申し訳ありません、艦長様。未知の特性を持つ超重級戦闘ユニットが1つ検知されました。報告書には、少なくとも艦隊旗艦の2倍の大きさであると記されています。」
languages.original_text: "The aggregated augur data indicates at least several hundred light fighters. We have also detected one... " {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "I apologise, Lord Captain. One super-heavy combat unit with unknown characteristics. The report specifically notes that it is at least twice the size of our fleet's flagship."

traits.locale_text: 「集約された占星術のデータから、少なくとも数百機の軽戦闘機が確認された。また、1つ...」{n}ヴォックス・マスターはわずかに躊躇した後、続けた。「申し訳ありません、艦長様。未知の特性を持つ超重級戦闘ユニットが1つ検知されました。報告書には、少なくとも艦隊旗艦の2倍の大きさであると記されています。」

languages.text: «Los datos son incompletos. El planeta enemigo desprende emanaciones de naturaleza desconocida que interfieren en los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g}». {n}La maestra de vocos titubea antes de continuar.{/n} «Durante el asalto, nos enfrentaremos con al menos un ala de interceptores dirigida por un crucero».
languages.original_text: "The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."

traits.locale_text: «Los datos son incompletos. El planeta enemigo desprende emanaciones de naturaleza desconocida que interfieren en los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g}». {n}La maestra de vocos titubea antes de continuar.{/n} «Durante el asalto, nos enfrentaremos con al menos un ala de interceptores dirigida por un crucero».

languages.text: “数据不完整。敌方行星正在释放一种性质不明的辐射，干扰了{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}的扫描。”{n}音阵大师微微犹豫了一下，才继续说道。{/n}“在突击过程中，我们至少会遭遇一支由巡洋舰带领的拦截舰编队。”
languages.original_text: "The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."

traits.locale_text: “数据不完整。敌方行星正在释放一种性质不明的辐射，干扰了{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}的扫描。”{n}音阵大师微微犹豫了一下，才继续说道。{/n}“在突击过程中，我们至少会遭遇一支由巡洋舰带领的拦截舰编队。”

languages.text: "Die Daten sind unvollständig. Der feindliche Planet gibt unbekannte Strahlen ab, die den Scan der {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} stören." {n}Die Voxmeisterin zögert kurz, ehe sie fortfährt.{/n} "Während des Angriffs, werden wir auf mindestens einen Interceptor-Flügel mit einem Kreuzer treffen."
languages.original_text: "The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."

traits.locale_text: "Die Daten sind unvollständig. Der feindliche Planet gibt unbekannte Strahlen ab, die den Scan der {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} stören." {n}Die Voxmeisterin zögert kurz, ehe sie fortfährt.{/n} "Während des Angriffs, werden wir auf mindestens einen Interceptor-Flügel mit einem Kreuzer treffen."

languages.text: "Veriler eksik. Düşman gezegeni, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}alamet{/g} taramasını bozan bilinmeyen nitelikte yayılımlar salıyor." {n}Voks Üstadı, hafifçe tereddüt edip sözüne devam ediyor.{/n} "Saldırı sırasında bir kruvazörün önderlik ettiği en az bir önleme filosu takımıyla karşılaşacağız."
languages.original_text: "The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."

traits.locale_text: "Veriler eksik. Düşman gezegeni, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}alamet{/g} taramasını bozan bilinmeyen nitelikte yayılımlar salıyor." {n}Voks Üstadı, hafifçe tereddüt edip sözüne devam ediyor.{/n} "Saldırı sırasında bir kruvazörün önderlik ettiği en az bir önleme filosu takımıyla karşılaşacağız."

languages.text: « Les données sont insuffisantes. La planète ennemie dégage des émanations de nature inconnue, ce qui perturbe l'analyse de l'{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augure{/g}. »{n}La maîtresse-vox marque une légère hésitation avant de poursuivre.{/n} « Durant l'assaut, nous croiserons au moins une escadrille d'intercepteurs accompagnée d'un croiseur. »
languages.original_text: "The data is incomplete.
